originContent: 自用的 Surge 规则、脚本和模块
translatedContent: 自用的 Surge 规则、脚本和模块

originContent: [General.conf](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/General.conf) 参考 [@scomper](https://github.com/scomper/Surge) 和 [@DivineEngine](https://github.com/DivineEngine/Profiles/tree/master/Surge) 的配置文件注释
translatedContent: [General.conf](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/General.conf) 参考 [@scomper](https://github.com/scomper/Surge) 和 [@DivineEngine](https://github.com/DivineEngine/Profiles/tree/master/Surge) 的配置文件注释

originContent: - [AppleOS_Update.list](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Ruleset/AppleOS_Update.list) 结合多个大佬的相关规则整理出来的各 Apple OS OTA 规则
translatedContent: - [AppleOS_Update.list](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Ruleset/AppleOS_Update.list) 结合多个大佬的相关规则整理出来的各 Apple OS OTA 规则

originContent: - [Mail.list](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Ruleset/Mail.list) 解决 iOS Mail App 收件问题
translatedContent: - [Mail.list](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Ruleset/Mail.list) 解决 iOS 邮件应用收件问题

originContent: - [MyMoneyPro.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/MyMoneyPro.sgmodule) 屏蔽随手记专业版 App 开屏广告
translatedContent: - [MyMoneyPro.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/MyMoneyPro.sgmodule) 屏蔽随手记专业版 App 开屏广告

originContent: - [WhiteList.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/WhiteList.sgmodule) 排除 AdBlock 误伤，增加一些自用的特殊规则
translatedContent: - [WhiteList.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/WhiteList.sgmodule) 排除 AdBlock 误伤，增加一些自用的特殊规则

originContent: - [Cookie.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/Cookie.sgmodule) 和 [Task.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/Task.sgmodule) 自用的各 App 每日签到
translatedContent: - [Cookie.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/Cookie.sgmodule) 和 [Task.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/Task.sgmodule) 自用的各 App 每日签到

originContent: - [VIFOnly.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/VIFOnly.sgmodule) 开启兼容模式，避免 App 提示使用代理
translatedContent: - [VIFOnly.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/VIFOnly.sgmodule) 开启兼容模式，避免 App 提示使用代理
